tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def closed-linear-issues (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

(def invalid-issues (filter (fn [pr] (not= (:state (first (linear_issues {:id (:closes_linear pr)}))) "done")) closed-linear-issues))

(def result (map (fn [pr] {:pr_number (:number pr) :linear_issue (:closes_linear pr)}) invalid-issues))

(count result)
